query: SELECT chrStatus, COUNT(*) as count FROM properfyProperties GROUP BY chrStatus; SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN chrStatus = 'LISTED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as listed, SUM(CASE WHEN isActive = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as active FROM properfyProperties;
